hooks.command: MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain | head -1 | sed 's/^worktree //'); [ -f "$MAIN/.env" ] && [ ! -f .env ] && cp "$MAIN/.env" .env; [ -f package.json ] && [ ! -d node_modules ] && pnpm install
MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain | head -1 | sed 's/^worktree //'); [ -f "$MAIN/.env" ] && cp "$MAIN/.env" .env; pnpm install
